section_desc: From posting a request to closing the deal — we've got every angle covered.
feed_desc: Browse real-time part requests from buyers across Algeria.
matching_desc: Our algorithm matches your inventory to buyer requests automatically.
quotes_desc: Receive and compare quotes from multiple verified sellers instantly.
security_desc: Every seller is verified. Transparent pricing, no hidden fees.
seller_dash_desc: Manage your offers, track performance, and grow your business.
buyer_dash_desc: Post requests, compare offers, and communicate with sellers.
lang_desc: Available in Arabic, French, and English for all users.
credits_desc: Flexible credit packages to post requests and access premium features.
